sessionStart.command: echo 'obsidian plugin development harness active | desktop + mobile emulation | MCPs: obsidian-cli, electron-devtools'

preToolUse.command: echo 'Executing bash command. Reuse the existing Obsidian instance, avoid destructive vault or release artifact operations.'

postToolUse.command: rtk git diff --name-only | rtk grep '\.ts$' >/dev/null && rtk npm run typecheck || true
